title: AxMap over an existing table
instruction: In the sandbox model, create an AxMap named DemoNoteMap (label + developer documentation @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote) with three fields: NoteId (String, EDT Num), Subject (String, EDT Description), CreatedDateTime (UtcDateTime). Map it to the existing ConDemoNoteHeader table with a 1:1 field mapping (each map field to the table field of the same name). The map must build clean.
